metadata.title: Volunteer Center of Mongolia
metadata.description: Volunteer Center of Mongolia is a non-profit organization that provides volunteering opportunities to Mongolian youth.

EventsPage.heroDesc: Make a real difference through our diverse volunteering programs and cultural exchange initiatives.
EventsPage.newsletterDesc: Get notified about new volunteering opportunities and social impact initiatives via email.

NewsPage.newsletterDesc: Get the latest articles, tips, and program announcements delivered to your inbox.

metadata.title: Lessons | Volunteer Center Mongolia
metadata.description: Access exclusive volunteering, language and skill-building lessons from VCM.

LessonsPage.heroDesc: Courses designed to build your skills, knowledge and cultural understanding for our volunteering programs.
LessonsPage.noLessons: No lessons available at the moment.

BeforeLoginNews.subheader: Welcome to Volunteer Center Mongolia! We make your path easier than ever before.
BeforeLoginNews.simple_desc: Our system guides you step-by-step through your application with smart hints.
BeforeLoginNews.flex_desc: Manage your profile on mobile, tablet, or PC – at your own pace.
BeforeLoginNews.security_desc: State-of-the-art encryption and strict data protection to keep your info safe.
BeforeLoginNews.free_desc: Registration is 100% free. It only becomes binding upon successful placement.

HeroSlider.slide1_desc: Make a meaningful impact by providing home-visit care and psychosocial support to children with special needs. Join a dedicated team of volunteers committed to bringing joy to families who need it most.
HeroSlider.slide2_desc: Share your knowledge and inspire the next generation through online tutoring. We offer passionate high school students and young adults the platform to teach Math, English, and more, helping children succeed academically.
HeroSlider.slide3_desc: Step up as a leader by planning, organizing, and managing impactful community events. V-Club is the creative force behind our initiatives, offering you the perfect opportunity to build project management skills while making a difference.

UsSection.content: Since 2007, the Mongolian Volunteer Center has pursued the noble goal of building a humane, democratic society through creative volunteerism. We have successfully implemented over 50 national projects focused on education, child protection, and sustainable livelihoods, creating and scaling model volunteer programs.
UsSection.val1_desc: Driven by the passion and dedication of volunteers at our core.
UsSection.val2_desc: Creating global change through impactful local action and partnership.
UsSection.val3_desc: Strengthening bonds to build more resilient and supportive communities.
UsSection.val4_desc: Infusing genuine passion and care into everything we undertake.

Marketplace.title: Explore Opportunities
Marketplace.subtitle: Browse available programs, events, and exclusive access passes for our VCM community.
Marketplace.item1_desc: Intensive 4-week German language immersion in Berlin.
Marketplace.item2_desc: Annual membership to exclusive volunteer networking events.
Marketplace.item3_desc: Premium application review and guaranteed family match.
Marketplace.item4_desc: Essentials for your first week in Europe.

WhyChooseUs.desc: We combine heartfelt care with rigorous safety standards to give you the most trusted Au Pair experience.
WhyChooseUs.card1_desc: Discover diverse opportunities including local volunteer events and flagship programs like EDU-Volunteer, AND, and V-Club.
WhyChooseUs.card2_desc: No bots here. Just real people ready to help you 24/7.
WhyChooseUs.card3_desc: Empowering communities through impactful volunteer work and shared multicultural experiences.
WhyChooseUs.card4_desc: Strict vetting process for every family. Your safety is our obsession.
WhyChooseUs.card5_desc: It's free to create a profile.

metadata.title: Au Pair in Germany | Mongolian Au Pair
metadata.description: Experience life in the heart of Europe. Master German, explore culture, and kickstart your future career.

hero.title: Au Pair in
hero.sub: A golden opportunity to live in the heart of Europe, experience a world-leading education system, and discover new cultures. Master your German language skills in a native environment and kickstart your future career.

info.title: About Germany
info.desc: Germany is a world-leading nation in technology and engineering with a population of 83 million. Known for its tuition-free education system, beautiful nature, historical landmarks, and rich cultural heritage.

intro.desc: The Au-Pair program is an international cultural exchange for young people aged 18-26. By living as a member of a host family, you improve your German language skills, gain independence, and learn responsibility. During the program, you are exempt from housing and food costs and receive regular monthly pocket money.

list.title: German A1+
list.desc: For participants with no prior language knowledge. Trains German from beginner to A2 level.

list.title: English B2
list.desc: With flight ticket bonus. For youth with English knowledge; German A1 required.

list.title: Au-Pair Boy
list.desc: Program for male participants. Requires English B2 / German A2+ and a driver's license.

contract.desc: Standards according to German Au-Pair regulations.

metadata.title: Au Pair in Austria | Mongolian Au Pair
metadata.description: Live amidst the Alps and Viennese waltzes. Improve your German and experience European culture.

hero.title: Au Pair in
hero.sub: Alp mountains, Viennese waltzes, and a history-rich country. Improve your German and discover European culture while living and learning in Austria.

info.title: About Austria
info.desc: Located in Central Europe, Austria is known for its stunning landscapes, high quality of life, and rich musical history as the home of Mozart.

contract.desc: Key agreement points according to Austrian law.

metadata.title: Au Pair in Belgium | Mongolian Au Pair
metadata.description: Join a host family in the heart of Europe. Learn French, Dutch, or German while exploring Belgium.

hero.title: Belgium:
hero.sub: Join a host family in the heart of Europe, amidst delicious chocolate and historical culture. A golden opportunity to learn French, Dutch, and German simultaneously.

info.title: Discover Belgium
info.desc: Belgium is a multicultural hub in Western Europe. As the capital of the EU, Brussels offers unique political and cultural experiences.

metadata.title: Au Pair in Switzerland | Mongolian Au Pair
metadata.description: High quality of life and stunning nature. Learn languages in one of the world's wealthiest countries.

hero.title: Au Pair in
hero.sub: Stunning Alps nature, high living standards, and 4-language culture. Master languages while living in one of the world's safest environments.

info.title: About Switzerland
info.desc: Switzerland is a leader in stability and quality education. Home to world-class brands like Rolex and Nestlé, it offers the world's highest standard of living.

contract.desc: Agreement standards according to Swiss regulations.

metadata.title: Contact Us | Mongolian Au Pair
metadata.description: Get in touch with our experts for any questions about the Au Pair program or your application.

ContactPage.heroDesc: Travel abroad and learn languages for free. We are here to help you every step of the way.

address.label: Visit Us
address.value: Sukhbaatar street-Baga Toiruu, Tsetsee Gun office, 300A#

ContactPage.formDesc: Have a question? We will respond within 24 hours.

metadata.title: AND Program | Community Care | VCM
metadata.description: Provide psychosocial support to children with special needs through our home-visit volunteer program.

hero.title: Community
hero.sub: Make a meaningful impact by providing psychosocial support to children with special needs. Join a dedicated team of volunteers committed to bringing joy to families who need it most.

info.title: About AND Program
info.desc: The AND Program focuses on home-visit care, providing essential support to families with children who have special needs. Our volunteers help create inclusive environments and offer much-needed respite and emotional support.

metadata.title: EDU-Volunteer | Education Support | VCM
metadata.description: Inspire the next generation by volunteering in schools and learning centers. Share your knowledge and skills.

hero.title: Inspire the
hero.sub: Share your knowledge and skills by volunteering at schools and learning centers. Empower young minds and build a brighter future together through education and mentorship.

info.title: About EDU-Volunteer
info.desc: EDU-Volunteer connects passionate individuals with educational institutions. Whether teaching a language, art, or technology, your contribution helps bridge educational gaps and inspires students to reach their full potential.

metadata.title: V-Club | Global Volunteer Community | VCM
metadata.description: Join our vibrant community of change-makers. Connect, collaborate, and create lasting social impact.

hero.title: Join the
hero.sub: Connect with fellow volunteers, share experiences, and collaborate on large-scale social initiatives. V-Club is where passion meets collective action for a better world.

info.title: About V-Club
info.desc: V-Club is the heart of our volunteer network. It's a platform for networking, skill-sharing, and organizing community-driven projects. Members gain access to exclusive workshops, leadership training, and international networking opportunities.

Programs.heroSub: Live abroad, learn a new culture and language, and gain experience. Improve your language skills in a native environment in Europe.

metadata.title: Au Pair Program | Mongolian Au Pair
metadata.description: Comprehensive guide to the international Au Pair program. Benefits, requirements, and how to join.

Programs.whatIsP1: The Au-Pair program is an international cultural exchange program for young people aged 18-26. The word Au-Pair comes from French meaning
Programs.whatIsBox: This expresses the idea that you become a member of the host family and live on equal terms with them during your stay.
Programs.historyP1: Strasbourg, France. The program was officially approved by the Council of Europe meeting.
Programs.historyP2: While only Europeans participated at that time, today it is successfully implemented in many countries around the world, including Mongolia, opening global doors for youth.
Programs.benefitsSub: A real investment in your future.
Programs.benefit1_desc: Real experience of living abroad and learning a new culture.
Programs.benefit2_desc: Master a foreign language perfectly in its environment and attend language courses.
Programs.benefit3_desc: Opportunity to travel freely in Europe and around the world.
Programs.benefit4_desc: Receive regular pocket money every month and become financially independent.
Programs.benefit5_desc: International work experience will be a huge advantage for your future career.
Programs.benefit6_desc: Make new friends from all over the world and expand your network.
Programs.step1_desc: If you choose Germany, attend A1 level training and take the Goethe exam.
Programs.step2_desc: Compile documents according to ECAPS standards and attend orientation training.
Programs.step3_desc: Connect with a host family, interview, and confirm the contract.
Programs.step4_desc: Get professional advice and instructions on applying for a visa at the Embassy.
Programs.step5_desc: Post-visa travel preparation, flight tickets, and pick-up service.
Programs.iapa_p1: The International Au-Pair Association (IAPA) ensures your safety 100%. Founded in 1994, the association cooperates with over 150 member organizations in more than 45 countries.
Programs.member_since: Top since 2011 The only one in Mongolia
Programs.ecaps_p1: The committee defining Au-Pair standards in Europe. Establishes unified rules for host families, agencies, and Au-Pairs to follow, developing a quality program.

metadata.title: About Us | Mongolian Au Pair
metadata.description: Learn about our mission to empower youth through cultural exchange and education in Europe.

About.intro: We bridge cultures and create opportunities for Mongolian youth through the Au Pair program, fostering global citizenship and language mastery.
About.storyP1: Founded with a vision to connect Mongolian youth with global opportunities, we have grown into the nation's premier cultural exchange agency.
About.storyP2: Our journey is defined by the thousands of lives transformed through cultural immersion, language learning, and international friendships.
About.card1_text: We operate with full transparency and ethical standards in every placement.
About.card2_text: Commited to providing the highest quality support for both families and au pairs.
About.card3_text: Building a supportive network that lasts far beyond the program duration.
About.card4_text: Fostering personal and professional development through cultural exchange.

dashboard.motivationMissing: You haven't provided a motivation letter yet. Completing this helps your application immensely.
dashboard.startJourneyDesc: You are currently a Guest. Apply now to become a Student.

Applied.title: Initial Review
Applied.action: Our team is currently verifying your request. Please wait for approval to start the document phase.

Documents.title: Documents Needed
Documents.action: You are approved! Please upload your passport, certificates, and medical records to proceed.

Interview.title: Agency Interview
Interview.action: Prepare for your screening. We will contact you via Skype or Phone to schedule your interview.

Matching.title: Family Matching
Matching.action: Your profile is live! We are sharing it with host families. Keep your phone reachable for matching calls.

Visa.title: Visa Process
Visa.action: Match found! Prepare your embassy documents and schedule your visa appointment immediately.

Departure.title: Final Departure
Departure.action: Visa granted! Pack your bags and check your pre-departure guide for your trip to Europe.
